Notes: #10 Wayne State wins ninth straight game overall and 18th in a row at Rice
Auditorium...Wayne State's Alyssa Fischbach scores a career high 24 points.
Game.Officials: Tom Knoblauch,  Brad Rekstad,  Jon Garrow
